title: Stainless Steel Strong Laundry Pegs, 50 Pcs Clips for Washing Line, Metal Clothes Pegs for Clothes, Snack Bags, Socks, Office
features: Durable & Rustproof: Clothes Pegs Chip Clips are made of stainless steel . Sturdy and stable, not easy to break, long service life, more practical than plastic or wooden clothespins.

Package Included: Contains stainless steel pegs,15mm caliber of clip, 54mm length, 12mm width, 6mm hole diameter. The pass-through diameter of the spring is a good size and therefore you can feed the clothesline through this hole.
Strong Grip: Clothes Pegs extra strong is designed with sturdy jaws, metal clothes pegs can firmly hold various items without loosening and easy to open without snagging, tearing or damaging clothes.

Multi Purpose: Heavy duty clothes pegs are versatile and can be used as outdoor clothesline clips, laundry hooks, snack bags, food freezer clips but also can be used as room decorations, kitchen supplies and drying paintings.
Portable Size: Clips for clothes are designed to be compact and easy to carry. They can easily fit in your bag without taking up too much space.
description: BONYCUST Metal Clothes Pegs, Stainless Steel Clothes Pegs for Laundry, Washing Line, Snack Bags, Paper Files
